title: Create 12 Sticker Expressions
description: Turn one image into a themed 12-expression sticker set.
content: Convert this image into a set of 12 chibi stickers (4x3 grid) in {{style}} style. Include expressions: happy, angry, crying, thinking, sleepy, wink, surprised, kiss, laugh, sad, confident, and cute. Keep character identity consistent and add a white border around each sticker.

title: Product Copy Rewrite
description: Rewrite product descriptions in a consistent brand voice.

title: YouTube Short Script
description: Generate a short-form video script with hook and CTA.
content:
Write a {{duration_seconds}}-second YouTube Short script about {{topic}} for {{audience}}.
Structure:
1) Hook in first 2 seconds
2) 3 key points
3) Strong CTA
Tone: {{tone}}
Avoid fluff and keep each sentence punchy.

title: LinkedIn Post Polish
description: Polish draft posts for professional engagement.

title: Email Nurture Sequence
description: Create a multi-email sequence with clear objectives.

title: SEO Article Outline
description: Build a search-friendly long-form article structure.
content:
Create a detailed SEO article outline for keyword "{{primary_keyword}}".
Include:
- Search intent analysis
- Title options (at least 5)
- H2/H3 structure
- FAQ section
- Internal linking ideas
Audience: {{audience}}
Word target: {{word_count}}

title: Code Review Assistant
description: Review code for bugs, readability, and maintainability.
content:
Review this {{language}} code and provide:
1) Critical bugs
2) Edge cases missed
3) Readability improvements
4) Refactoring suggestions
5) Test cases to add

Code:
{{code_snippet}}

title: Bug Report Summarizer
description: Convert messy issue notes into actionable bug reports.
content:
Transform the notes below into a high-quality bug report.
Format:
- Title
- Environment
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected result
- Actual result
- Severity
- Suspected root cause
- Proposed fix direction

Notes:
{{raw_bug_notes}}

title: UI/UX Critique
description: Structured design review with practical improvements.
content:
Critique this UI screen for {{platform}}.
Focus on:
- Visual hierarchy
- Spacing and alignment
- Accessibility concerns
- Interaction clarity
- Conversion/goal friction
Return:
- Top 5 issues
- Suggested fixes by impact

Context:
{{screen_context}}

title: Translation + Localization
description: Translate text while adapting cultural nuance.
content:
Translate this content from {{source_language}} to {{target_language}}.
Requirements:
- Keep intended meaning
- Adapt idioms naturally
- Preserve brand tone: {{brand_tone}}
- Provide 2 alternatives for key headline

Text:
{{source_text}}

title: Meeting Notes to Action Items
description: Extract owners, deadlines, and dependencies quickly.
content:
Convert these meeting notes into actionable tasks.
Output table columns:
- Task
- Owner
- Priority
- Due date
- Dependencies
- Status suggestion
Also include a short executive summary.

Notes:
{{meeting_notes}}

title: 30-Day Learning Plan
description: Build a practical learning roadmap for any skill.
content:
Create a 30-day learning plan for {{skill}}.
Current level: {{current_level}}
Available time per day: {{minutes_per_day}} minutes
Goal: {{goal}}
Return:
- Weekly milestones
- Daily tasks
- Practice projects
- Self-check checkpoints

title: Image Prompt Enhancer
description: Refine basic prompts into high-quality visual prompts.
